spacing_and_layout.grid: Mobile-first full width, safe area margins

bottom_tabs.style: Opaque dark surface (#121212) with subtle top border (#27272A). Active icon pure white, inactive #A1A1AA.

life_score_ring.style: SVG circular progress. Background track #27272A, Foreground track uses solid white (#FFFFFF). Large typography (h1_score) in the center.

heatmap_calendar.style: GitHub-style 7xN grid of rounded squares (border-radius: 4px). Gap: 4px. Colors map to activity levels.

category_cards.style: Flat surface (#121212), 16px border radius, 1px subtle border. Left-aligned text, top-right category icon in designated category color.

daily_check_in_list.style: Notion-like to-do list. Custom checkbox component (circle, hollow when empty, filled with category color and white checkmark when done).

Dashboard.layout: Vertical ScrollView. Top: Safe Area + Header (Greeting). Section 1: Life Score Ring (Centered). Section 2: Heatmap. Section 3: 2-column grid of Category Scores. Section 4: Current Streaks.

Daily_Check_In.layout: Vertical ScrollView. Top: Date Header. Body: Grouped lists by Category. Each group has a Label and items with checkboxes. Sticky Bottom Footer: 'Save Day' primary button.

Insights.layout: Vertical ScrollView. Charts section: Weekly/Monthly trends. Correlations section: Text-heavy insights.

History.layout: FlatList/SectionList. Timeline view of past days. Each row shows Date, Overall Score, and mini dots for completed categories.

Settings.layout: Vertical ScrollView. Profile section, Habit management, Notification toggles, Theme toggle.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build strictly as a React Native / Expo application using View, Text, ScrollView, and StyleSheet.
Do NOT use HTML/DOM elements like div, span, or standard web Tailwind CSS.
Implement the custom fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Manrope) via expo-font.
ALL interactive elements (TouchableOpacity, Pressable, TextInput) MUST include a data-testid attribute in the format kebab-case-role.
Use @expo/vector-icons or lucide-react-native for all iconography.
Use react-native-svg for the Life Score Ring and Heatmap calendar blocks.
Maintain strict Dark Mode aesthetics: deep blacks (#050505) with #121212 for elevated cards.
Ensure generous padding (minimum 24px horizontal on main views) for a premium feel.
Use subtle borders (#27272A) instead of drop shadows in dark mode.
